fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 66 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which incorrectly treats an offer as valid when checked at the exact moment of its deadline. The comparison should be greater-than-or-equal-to (`>=`) to correctly expire offers at their deadline.

constraints.intent: The check should correctly handle the boundary case where the current time is exactly the deadline.
If an offer value is returned, the current time must be strictly before the effective deadline.
The effective deadline, after adjustment, should not be earlier than the original deadline.
